name: CLKSOMV_f
description: Event summer - computes the union of multiple event streams
xmlExample: <RoundBlock id="..." parent="..." interfaceFunctionName="CLKSOMV_f" blockType="d" dependsOnU="0" dependsOnT="0" simulationFunctionName="sum" simulationFunctionType="DEFAULT" style="CLKSOMV_f"><ScilabDouble as="exprs" height="0" width="0"/><ScilabDouble as="realParameters" height="0" width="0"/><ScilabDouble as="integerParameters" height="0" width="0"/><ScilabInteger as="nbZerosCrossing" height="1" width="1" intPrecision="sci_int32"><data line="0" column="0" value="0"/></ScilabInteger><ScilabInteger as="nmode" height="1" width="1" intPrecision="sci_int32"><data line="0" column="0" value="0"/></ScilabInteger><ScilabDouble as="state" height="0" width="0"/><ScilabDouble as="dState" height="0" width="0"/><mxGeometry as="geometry" x="0.0" y="0.0" width="40.0" height="40.0"/></RoundBlock>
anomalies: No exprs or parameters in reference
Combines 3 event inputs into 1 output (OR logic)
criticalRules: Must have 3 control ports in reference setup
commonUses: Merging multiple event sources to trigger a block
